title: Anesthesia procedure note documentation prompt
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

treatment_and_management.text: Supports documented procedure name, counts, specimen labeling, equipment problems, and key recovery or management concerns without generating a plan.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The WHO sign-out section was reviewed for procedure name, counts, specimens, equipment issues, and recovery concerns but was not mapped to the generic legacy scaffold.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports documented procedure name, counts, specimen labeling, equipment problems, and key recovery or management concerns without generating a plan.

source.title: WHO Guidelines for Safe Surgery 2009: Safe Surgery Saves Lives — Surgical Safety Checklist and Implementation Manual

exact_section.heading: Before patient leaves operating room — Sign Out

medication.text: Supports re-evaluation, equipment, medicines, staff, monitoring, techniques, positioning, lines and procedures, unusual events, fluids or blood products, output, and transfer status as recorded facts.
medication.rationale: The exact ASA section supports an anesthesia procedure record containing staff, monitoring, technique, medicines, positioning, lines, unusual events, fluids, output, and transfer status as observed facts; the generic legacy fields do not capture most of these domains.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports re-evaluation, equipment, medicines, staff, monitoring, techniques, positioning, lines and procedures, unusual events, fluids or blood products, output, and transfer status as recorded facts.

source.title: Statement on Documentation of Anesthesia Care

follow_up.text: Supports complete, contemporaneous records for assessment, consent, anesthesia or sedation, procedure, monitoring, recovery, discharge, complications, and follow-up.
follow_up.rationale: The UAE record section was reviewed for complete procedure, anesthesia or sedation, monitoring, recovery, complication, and follow-up records, but no additional specific legacy item was available to map.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports complete, contemporaneous records for assessment, consent, anesthesia or sedation, procedure, monitoring, recovery, discharge, complications, and follow-up.

sources_used.title: Statement on Documentation of Anesthesia Care

source_limitations: Procedure and indication, consent, staff, technique, medicine and dose, monitoring, position, lines, equipment, events, fluids, blood products, output, specimens, counts, transfer status, complications, recovery, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
